004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.html;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.*;
022
023/**
024 * Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
025 *
026 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
027 *
028 * Handles <c>Accept</c> types:  <bc>text/html+schema</bc>
029 * <p>
030 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>text/html</bc>
031 *
032 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
033 *
034 * Essentially the same as {@link HtmlDocSerializer}, except serializes the POJO metamodel instead of the model itself.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * Produces output that describes the POJO metamodel similar to an XML schema document.
038 *
039 * <p>
040 * The easiest way to create instances of this class is through the {@link HtmlSerializer#getSchemaSerializer()},
041 * which will create a schema serializer with the same settings as the originating serializer.
042 *
043 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
044 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
048 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/HtmlBasics">HTML Basics</a>
049
050 * </ul>
051 */
052@SuppressWarnings({
053   "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for HtmlSchemaDocSerializer hierarchy
054})
055public class HtmlSchemaDocSerializer extends HtmlDocSerializer {
056
057   /**
058    * Builder class.
059    */
060   public static class Builder extends HtmlDocSerializer.Builder<Builder> {
061
062      JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder generatorBuilder;
063
064      /**
065       * Constructor, default settings.
066       */
067      protected Builder() {
068         produces("text/html");
069         accept("text/html+schema");
070         generatorBuilder = JsonSchemaGenerator.create().marshallingContext(marshallingContext());
071      }
072
073      /**
074       * Copy constructor.
075       *
076       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
077       */
078      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
079         super(copyFrom);
080         generatorBuilder = copyFrom.generatorBuilder.copy().marshallingContext(marshallingContext());
081      }
082
083      /**
084       * Copy constructor.
085       *
086       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
087       */
088      protected Builder(HtmlSchemaDocSerializer copyFrom) {
089         super(copyFrom);
090         generatorBuilder = copyFrom.generator.copy().marshallingContext(marshallingContext());
091      }
092
093      /**
094       * <i><l>HtmlSchemaSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Add descriptions.
095       *
096       * <p>
097       * Identifies which categories of types that descriptions should be automatically added to generated schemas.
098       * <p>
099       * The description is the result of calling {@link ClassMeta#getName()}.
100       *
101       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
102       *    <li class='jm'>{@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#addDescriptionsTo(TypeCategory...)}
103       * </ul>
104       *
105       * @param values
106       *    The values to add to this setting.
107       *    <br>The default is an empty string.
108       * @return This object.
109       */
110      public Builder addDescriptionsTo(TypeCategory...values) {
111         generatorBuilder.addDescriptionsTo(values);
112         return this;
113      }
114
115      /**
116       * <i><l>HtmlSchemaSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Add examples.
117       *
118       * <p>
119       * Identifies which categories of types that examples should be automatically added to generated schemas.
120       * <p>
121       * The examples come from calling {@link ClassMeta#getExample(MarshallingSession,JsonParserSession)} which in turn gets examples
122       * from the following:
123       * <ul class='javatree'>
124       *    <li class='ja'>{@link Example}
125       *    <li class='ja'>{@link Marshalled#example() Marshalled(example)}
126       * </ul>
127       *
128       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
129       *    <li class='jm'>{@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#addExamplesTo(TypeCategory...)}
130       * </ul>
131       *
132       * @param values
133       *    The values to add to this setting.
134       *    <br>The default is an empty string.
135       * @return This object.
136       */
137      public Builder addExamplesTo(TypeCategory...values) {
138         generatorBuilder.addExamplesTo(values);
139         return this;
140      }
141
142      /**
143       * <i><l>HtmlSchemaSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Allow nested descriptions.
144       *
145       * <p>
146       * Identifies whether nested descriptions are allowed in schema definitions.
147       *
148       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
149       *    <li class='jm'>{@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#allowNestedDescriptions()}
150       * </ul>
151       *
152       * @return This object.
153       */
154      public Builder allowNestedDescriptions() {
155         generatorBuilder.allowNestedDescriptions();
156         return this;
157      }
158
159      /**
160       * <i><l>HtmlSchemaSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Allow nested examples.
161       *
162       * <p>
163       * Identifies whether nested examples are allowed in schema definitions.
164       *
165       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
166       *    <li class='jm'>{@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#allowNestedExamples()}
167       * </ul>
168       *
169       * @return This object.
170       */
171      public Builder allowNestedExamples() {
172         generatorBuilder.allowNestedExamples();
173         return this;
174      }
175
176      /**
177       * <i><l>HtmlSchemaSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Schema definition mapper.
178       *
179       * <p>
180       * Interface to use for converting Bean classes to definition IDs and URIs.
181       * <p>
182       * Used primarily for defining common definition sections for beans in Swagger JSON.
183       * <p>
184       * This setting is ignored if {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#useBeanDefs()} is not enabled.
185       *
186       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
187       *    <li class='jm'>{@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder#beanDefMapper(Class)}
188       * </ul>
189       *
190       * @param value
191       *    The new value for this property.
192       *    <br>The default is {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.BasicBeanDefMapper}.
193       * @return This object.
194       */
195      public Builder beanDefMapper(Class<? extends MarshallingDefMapper> value) {
196         generatorBuilder.beanDefMapper(value);
197         return this;
198      }
199
200      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
201      public HtmlSchemaDocSerializer build() {
202         return build(HtmlSchemaDocSerializer.class);
203      }
204
205      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
206      public Builder copy() {
207         return new Builder(this);
208      }
209
210      /**
211       * <i><l>HtmlSchemaSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Use bean definitions.
212       *
213       * <p>
214       * When enabled, schemas on beans will be serialized as the following:
215       * <p class='bjson'>
216       *    {
217       *       type: <js>'object'</js>,
218       *       <js>'$ref'</js>: <js>'#/definitions/TypeId'</js>
219       *    }
220       * </p>
221       *
222       * @return This object.
223       */
224      public Builder useBeanDefs() {
225         generatorBuilder.useBeanDefs();
226         return this;
227      }
228
229
230      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
231      @SuppressWarnings({
232         "unchecked" // Varargs method requires unchecked cast
233      })
234      public Builder widgets(java.lang.Class<? extends org.apache.juneau.marshall.html.HtmlWidget>...values) {
235         super.widgets(values);
236         return this;
237      }
238
239   }
240
241   /**
242    * Creates a new builder for this object.
243    *
244    * @return A new builder.
245    */
246   public static Builder create() {
247      return new Builder();
248   }
249
250   final JsonSchemaGenerator generator;
251
252   /**
253    * Constructor.
254    *
255    * @param builder
256    *    The builder for this object.
257    */
258   public HtmlSchemaDocSerializer(HtmlDocSerializer.Builder<?> builder) {
259      super(builder.detectRecursions().ignoreRecursions());
260
261      generator = JsonSchemaGenerator.create().marshallingContext(getMarshallingContext()).build();
262   }
263
264   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
265   public Builder copy() {
266      return new Builder(this);
267   }
268
269   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
270   public HtmlSchemaDocSerializerSession.Builder createSession() {
271      return HtmlSchemaDocSerializerSession.create(this);
272   }
273
274   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
275   public HtmlSchemaDocSerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
276
277   JsonSchemaGenerator getGenerator() { return generator; }
278}
